title: astragalus costatus
intro: Astragalus costatus, also known as the desert milk-vetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus costatus include reducing stress and fatigue, improving immune function, and protecting against infections. The herbal preparations of Astragalus costatus are typically made into teas, capsules, or tinctures, and are used to support overall health and well-being.
